Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 110 

PRVDR_LCTN_ID 

LABEL: Provider Location Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: Assigns the provider location identification numbers that identify the geographic locations where the 
provider performs services. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_LCTN_ID 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_LCTN_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 5 

FILE(S): APR Location 
APR License 
APR Identifiers 
APR bed type 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual
